sourceMovie.title: Palmer
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit Palmer for the same reason it broke through in 2021: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a drama rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Fisher Stevens keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The film leans hard into its core genre, which is exactly what fans say they wanted more of from blockbusters in that era.

recommendations.title: Requiem for a Dream
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Palmer clicked for you, Requiem for a Dream (2000) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Palmer?
faq.answer: Try Requiem for a Dream, Moonlight, The Basketball Diaries—each shares DNA with Palmer while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Palmer?
faq.answer: Palmer (2021) is best described as Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Palmer worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 8.1/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this drama lane.
